description: ALP-001 Simulator Roadmap — 13 simulators mapped to modules. Simulators are interactive, hands-on environments where learners practice in realistic, sandboxed settings.

simulators.name: Linux Terminal
simulators.description: Interactive Linux terminal in the browser. Execute real commands, explore the filesystem, manage processes, and write scripts.

simulators.name: Azure Portal
simulators.description: Guided Azure Portal simulator for learning the UI, resource creation, and management workflows without real Azure costs.

simulators.name: Terraform Simulator
simulators.description: Write and apply Terraform configurations in a sandboxed environment. Plan, apply, destroy — see the full IaC lifecycle.

simulators.name: Docker Simulator
simulators.description: Build, run, and debug Docker containers. Experiment with Dockerfiles, multi-stage builds, and compose files.

simulators.name: Kubernetes Simulator
simulators.description: Full Kubernetes cluster in the browser. Deploy pods, services, ingress, configmaps, and troubleshoot issues.

simulators.name: Networking Simulator
simulators.description: Design and test network topologies. Configure subnets, routing tables, firewalls, and load balancers.

simulators.name: CIDR Calculator
simulators.description: Interactive CIDR calculator and subnetting practice tool. Visualize address spaces and practice subnetting.

simulators.name: DNS Simulator
simulators.description: Trace DNS resolution, configure zones, and troubleshoot DNS issues. Understand the full resolution chain.

simulators.name: IAM Simulator
simulators.description: Design and test IAM policies, RBAC configurations, and conditional access rules. See the effect of policies in real-time.

simulators.name: Monitoring Simulator
simulators.description: Configure Prometheus alerts, build Grafana dashboards, and respond to simulated production incidents.

simulators.name: Incident Response Simulator
simulators.description: Live incident scenarios. Production is down — diagnose, mitigate, resolve, and write the postmortem.

simulators.name: Architecture Builder
simulators.description: Drag-and-drop cloud architecture designer. Build diagrams, validate against best practices, and get AI feedback.

simulators.name: AI Playground
simulators.description: Experiment with LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, and agent architectures in a sandboxed AI environment.

implementation_notes.phase: Simulators are architectural specifications. Implementation planned in future phases.
